rules.rule: every reviewer override (OCR correction, candidate state change, extraction rejection) MUST be reviewer-attributed and cite the prior artifact_id.
overrides are append-only; the prior artifact remains intact and is not deleted.
rejection overrides MUST cite at least one rule_id from ED-/OF-/EC-/TC-/EL-/ER-/XL-/XI-* tables.
autonomous overrides are FORBIDDEN; the runtime may PROPOSE candidates only.
